positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a fox wearing a vintage top hat, standing amidst a celestial arrangement of glowing stars and crescent moons. The style is detailed neo-Victorian etching merged with vibrant cosmic watercolor, giving a sophisticated, whimsical feel. The composition is highly centralized, featuring the fox as the primary subject against a deep indigo and gold nebula background. Focus on clean linework, strong silhouette definition, and dramatic rim lighting to make the subject pop. Color palette should be rich jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by gold leaf highlights. Print-friendly, vectorized quality, high contrast, suitable for repeating pattern or single placement print on apparel. --ar 1:1
